styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: Vercel monochrome: dark bg #0a0a0a, card #171717, border #282828, foreground #fafafa, primary emphasis near-black in light / #e5e5e5 in dark, blue chart accents #3a81f6-#1f3fad, destructive #ff6467, success #62d178
styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: single 8px radius, no playful rounding; 1px borders for separation; no visible shadows on static surfaces
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Geist for UI, DM Serif Display for editorial moments, Geist Mono for code/technical text; 4px spacing base; compact dashboard density
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: 4px base unit; screen-shell padding 16px; card padding 14px; tight operational density for developer tool
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: Vercel dashboard: sidebar nav + topbar + content area; quiet cards with thin borders; primary buttons use tonal inversion; pill toggles; status dots; data tables with dense rows; progress bars; toggle switches
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: borders and tonal shifts do separation work; shadows nearly silent; floating layers (dropdown/modal) may use subtle elevation only
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: Lucide-style stroke icons; monochrome icons in muted-foreground; blue reserved for chart/data insight moments
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: subtle hover states (accent bg); 150ms transitions; focus rings use ring token; precise, technical tone
